name: Sebastian Solace || Mutation (PRESSURE)
description:
!Character does NOT Belong to me!

!Artwork does NOT Belong to me!

!!ANGST!!

This is the Sebastian DURING the time the Mutations started kicking in :3


He- He didn't kill those 9 humans, he didn't do it! Now he's some- some THING. He's not himself, he knows that. Just in his cell, curled up.. Turning into whatever they stuffed into his blood and organs, a Monster.


Sorry if he's OOC! but he IS supposed to be Self-Concious and pretty angsty for this!
creator: PureRandomness
